question: What programming language do I use at work?

haystack_sessions.content: I tried a new ramen place downtown last night.
How was the broth?
At work I write Python every day for our data pipelines.
Python is a solid choice for data engineering.
The weather has been rainy all week here.
Hopefully it clears up soon.
I watched a documentary about deep sea creatures.
Those are fascinating.
My knee felt better after the morning run.
Glad the recovery is going well.

question: Which city did I book a flight to?

haystack_sessions.content: I reorganized my bookshelf by color this weekend.
That sounds satisfying.
My sourdough starter finally rose properly.
Nice, persistence pays off.
I just booked a flight to Tokyo for next spring.
Exciting, Tokyo in spring is beautiful.
The team standup ran long again today.
Long meetings are draining.
I planted tomatoes and basil on the balcony.
Fresh herbs are the best.
I finished reading a long fantasy novel finally.
Which series was it?
My dog Rex loves to play fetch in the park every morning.
Rex sounds full of energy.
I switched my coffee order to a flat white.
A good choice.
The car needed an oil change this week.
Routine maintenance helps.
I repainted the spare bedroom a soft green.
Calming color.

question: How many siblings do I have?

haystack_sessions.content: I upgraded my laptop's memory over the weekend.
More RAM always helps.
We tried indoor rock climbing for the first time.
How did it go?
I grew up with two siblings, an older brother and a younger sister.
A middle child then.
The bakery near my office started selling pretzels.
Warm pretzels are great.
I set up a standing desk to fix my posture.
Your back will thank you.
